forecast.name: Overnight
forecast.detailedForecast: Cloudy, with a low around 57. West southwest wind around 7 mph.

forecast.name: Monday
forecast.detailedForecast: Mostly cloudy. High near 66, with temperatures falling to around 64 in the afternoon. West southwest wind 5 to 12 mph.

weather_report:
The cool embrace of a fog-tinged night lingers in Downtown San Francisco as the clock strikes two. The thick, gray clouds blanket the horizon, casting a muted glow against the backdrop of the city’s architecture. With the soft caress of a west-southwest wind whispering through the streets, the temperature hovers gently around fifty-seven, setting a tone that suggests wrapped scarves and light layers will be your companions for the evening.

As dawn approaches, the day promises to unfurl with a mostly cloudy demeanor. Anticipate a high that flirts with sixty-six, only to soften into the afternoon’s embrace of sixty-four, as those clouds dance eloquently across the wide Pacific sky. Fog may reveal itself in shy patches over the bay, softening the edges of landmarks and holding the chill of the ocean close. Given these conditions, an adaptable wardrobe seems wise—perhaps a light jacket or a sweater to stave off the cool drafts, paired with comfortable shoes for a stroll along the waterfront or through the bustling streets where cafés brew their morning offerings. 

In this ethereal ambience, why not find a pocket of calm? A leisurely walk to the Farmer’s Market, or a cozy seat at a local café, steaming cup in hand, allows the day to unfold without haste. Continue to engage with the character of the city, its light-absorbing mist, and the intricate rhythm that captures those who wander.
